query:
UPDATE "ob-poc".investors
            SET lifecycle_state = 'KYC_IN_PROGRESS',
                kyc_status = 'IN_PROGRESS',
                kyc_case_id = COALESCE($2, kyc_case_id),
                lifecycle_notes = $3,
                updated_at = NOW()
            WHERE investor_id = $1
            RETURNING investor_id
